name: tokori
description: Local-first desktop tutor for language learners. Tauri 2 + React 19 + Rust.

scripts.build:hosted: VITE_HOSTED_MODE=1 tsc -b && VITE_HOSTED_MODE=1 vite build --outDir dist-hosted
scripts.demo:build: npm run build && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const d='../tokori-cloud/public/demo';if(!fs.existsSync('../tokori-cloud/public')){console.error('cloud repo not found at ../tokori-cloud — set TOKORI_CLOUD_DIR or move demo manually');process.exit(1)};if(fs.existsSync(d))fs.rmSync(d,{recursive:true,force:true});fs.cpSync('dist',d,{recursive:true});console.log('tokori-cloud/public/demo refreshed from dist (HOSTED=false — in-memory seeded sample data)');"
scripts.app:build:vite: VITE_HOSTED_MODE=1 VITE_API_SAME_ORIGIN=1 tsc -b && VITE_HOSTED_MODE=1 VITE_API_SAME_ORIGIN=1 vite build --outDir dist-hosted --base=/app/
scripts.app:build: npm run app:build:vite && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const d='../tokori-cloud/public/app';if(!fs.existsSync('../tokori-cloud/public')){console.error('cloud repo not found at ../tokori-cloud — set TOKORI_CLOUD_DIR or move app manually');process.exit(1)};if(fs.existsSync(d))fs.rmSync(d,{recursive:true,force:true});fs.cpSync('dist-hosted',d,{recursive:true});console.log('tokori-cloud/public/app refreshed from dist-hosted');"
